title: Sludir soap
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Sludir_soap.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A lump of sludir soap.]]
'''Sludir soap''' was a gray gooey substance that the [[Sludir]] used to keep their armored skin tough and clean. Sludir [[Soap/Legends|soap]] typically came in big lumps.<ref name="Big Quince">{{JournalCite|2|Big Quince (short story)}}</ref>

The soap was also used to fill cracks in their natural armor that occurred due to injury or age.<ref name="GG12">''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|Big Quince (short story)}} {{1st}}
